race.comment: ALTROVE (10) lines up on the back of a 0.8 lengths fourth over 1200m at Corowa on Monday. Not beaten far the start prior at Kilmore either, so looks to be tracking the right way and looks really well in after the 4kg claim. SLY CASCATA (5) also gets a bit of weight relief, thanks to Cassidy Hill's 3kg claim, and he needs to be respected on consistency alone, let alone the fact he's drawn ideally. SWING YOUR MAGIC (2) gets here second-up after a 3.5-length fifth in a stronger race as Seymour, so with that run under the belt and a nice draw he looks like playing a role. FLEET DESTINATION (14) doesn't have the luxury of a good draw, but is racing consistently and can be expected to acquit himself well even though he is up in grade. OVERTOUX (12) led from a wide gate last time over 1300m at Wangaratta but felt the pinch and faded out of it. Drawn to enjoy a nice trail just off the pace. Winning claims on best figures.
